maintenance_window.project_owner_statement: All members were consulted and no member is performing work on the node.
authorized_actions: temporary stop and verified restoration of Docker, containerd, LXD allocators, and nvidia-persistenced
GPU recovery when required by a fail-closed runbook
maintenance_window.password_handling: The host account owner enters the sudo password directly into the remote TTY; it is not recorded by the project.

excluded_devices.disposition: quarantine: repeated NVIDIA RM initialization failure
quarantine: uncorrectable ECC, pending row-remap, and Xid 95
healthy spare excluded to enforce the exact four-GPU project scope
healthy spare excluded to enforce the exact four-GPU project scope

isolation_mechanism: root-controlled exact PCI unbind from the NVIDIA driver, with excluded device nodes retained as root-only
rollback_policy: No automatic rebind of faulting devices. Any rollback requires a new drained maintenance window and exact-identity revalidation.
